data.title: Global Oil Immersed Current Transformer market valued at USD 1,893M in 2024, projected to reach USD 3,044.3M by 2032 with a CAGR of 6.12%.
data.description: A recent market report indicates that the global Oil Immersed Current Transformer market was valued at USD 1,893 million in 2024. Projections suggest a steady growth at a CAGR of 6.12% from 2024 to 2032, with an expected market value of USD 3,044.3 million.

data.title: MahaloHub introduces Predictive Resonance Score™ to predict creative performance before launch, addressing CMOs' lack of confidence.
data.description: Today, MahaloHub unveiled the Predictive Resonance Score™ (PRS), a groundbreaking AI metric aimed at assisting marketing teams. Within an industry where 70% of CMOs express uncertainty about creative performance pre-launch, this tool aids in gauging message or concept effectiveness.

data.title: Utah man receives 3-year prison term for $2.9M fraud involving crypto cash scheme & investor fraud.
data.description: A man from Utah has been sentenced for his involvement in investor fraud and conducting unlicensed cash-to-crypto operations. The prosecution linked these two illegal activities together. The severity of the sentence serves as a warning to others engaging in similar illicit activities.

data.title: China-Thailand youth exchange program launched in Bangkok with electric scooters featuring panda mascot "Upanda".
data.description: Today in Bangkok, the "Boundless Creativity • Youth Link" China–Thailand Youth Cultural Exchange Event kicked off with a colorful parade of electric scooters adorned with the Chinese giant panda mascot "Upanda." This event, organized by LUYUAN, celebrates cultural exchange between China and Thailand. The parade attracted a crowd of onlookers in Bangkok as the fleet of electric scooters, representing youth creativity, paraded through the streets.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric invests in ADT Technology Service (Suzhou) in China. Mitsubishi Electric Intelligent Manufacturing Tech acquires a stake in ADTTech, a Suzhou-based software developer.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) shared news of its subsidiary, Mitsubishi Electric Intelligent Manufacturing Technology (China) Group Co., Ltd., acquiring a stake in ADT Technology Service (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. based in Suzhou, China. The subsidiary had previously entered a collaboration agreement with ADT Tech, a software developer specializing in production planning, manufacturing management, and quality control solutions. This move signifies a strategic partnership between the companies for further development and innovation in the industry.
